info.title: Gecko SAST Scanner API
info.description: Use the Gecko API to launch scans and read scan, repository, and vulnerability data for your active team.

tags.name: Scans
tags.description: Launch scans and read scan-level data.

tags.name: Repositories
tags.description: Read repository inventory and repository vulnerability data.

tags.name: Vulnerabilities
tags.description: Read vulnerability data across your active team.

get.description: Returns the current API health status and the list of public `v1` endpoints. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Returns scans for the team attached to your API key. This route requires a key whose role includes the `scans.read` permission.

403.description: The API key is valid, but the key does not include the `scans.read` permission.

post.description: Starts a new scan for a GitLab repository that the team can access. This route requires a key whose role includes the `scans.run` permission, a configured team GitLab integration, and available scan capacity on the current plan. Gecko resolves the target branch in this order: request `branch`, branch in the GitLab URL, then the repository default branch.

400.description: The request body or GitLab URL is invalid.

403.description: The API key does not have permission to run scans, the key is not attached to a team, the team GitLab integration is unavailable, or the plan scan limit was reached.

value.error: No active team associated with API key
GitLab integration not configured for team

404.description: The team for the API key could not be found.

502.description: Gecko created the scan record, but the scanner launch failed.

get.description: Returns vulnerabilities for a specific scan in the team attached to your API key.

200.description: A paginated list of vulnerabilities for the scan.

data.title: Unbounded command template allows shell injection
data.shortDescription: User input is interpolated into a shell command without proper quoting.

400.description: The path or query parameters are invalid.

value.error: Severity must be a number between 0 and 10

403.description: The API key is not attached to an active team.

example.error: No active team associated with API key

404.description: The scan does not exist or is outside the team scope for the API key.

get.description: Returns the scan endpoint definition that Gecko stored for the scan. Gecko returns the raw value and a parsed object when the stored format is JSON.

info:

paths:

      summary: Health

403.description: The API key is not attached to an active team.

example.error: No active team associated with API key

404.description: The scan does not exist or is outside the team scope for the API key.

get.description: Returns the generated scan summary as Markdown. Gecko uses the stored summary string directly when it is already Markdown and builds Markdown from the structured summary payload otherwise.

200.description: The scan wiki in Markdown format.

text/markdown.example:
# Threat model summary

This scan covers the checkout service.

---

## Authentication

The service uses bearer tokens.

403.description: The API key is not attached to an active team.

example.error: No active team associated with API key

404.description: The scan does not exist, is outside the team scope for the API key, or no summary is available for the scan.

value.error: No summary available for this scan

get.description: Returns repositories for the team attached to your API key.
Returns vulnerabilities for the repository path in `repositoryId`. URL-encode the repository path before you send it. For example, use `gecko-security%2FPaperbaum` for `gecko-security/Paperbaum`.

200.description: A paginated list of vulnerabilities for the repository.

data.title: Path Traversal in File Download
data.shortDescription: User-controlled path allows reading arbitrary files.

400.description: The path or query parameters are invalid.

value.error: Severity must be a number between 0 and 10
Days must be a positive integer

get.summary: List vulnerabilities across the active team
get.description: Returns vulnerabilities across all scans that belong to the team attached to your API key.

200.description: A paginated list of vulnerabilities across the active team.

data.title: SQL Injection in User Search
data.shortDescription: User input directly concatenated into SQL query.

value.error: Severity must be a number between 0 and 10
Days must be a positive integer

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Team-scoped Gecko API key. Keys start with `gk_`.

XRateLimitRemaining.description: Requests remaining in the current one-hour window for the API key.

XRateLimitReset.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the current one-hour rate-limit window resets.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds to wait before retrying the request.

repositoryId.name: repositoryId
repositoryId.description: URL-encoded repository path, for example `gecko-security%2FPaperbaum` or `gitlab:group%2Fproject`.

name.name: name
name.description: Filter repositories by repository name or full name.

severityMinimum.name: severity
severityMinimum.description: Filter to vulnerabilities with a severity greater than or equal to this value.

severityExact.name: severity
severityExact.description: Filter to vulnerabilities whose severity matches this value exactly.

type.name: type
type.description: Filter vulnerabilities by type. Gecko performs a case-insensitive substring match.

cwe.name: cwe
cwe.description: Filter vulnerabilities by CWE. Gecko performs a case-insensitive substring match.

scanIdFilter.name: scan_id
scanIdFilter.description: Filter cross-scan vulnerability results to a single scan UUID.

days.name: days
days.description: Filter results to scans created within the last `N` days.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Gecko defaults to `100` and caps the value at `1000`.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Number of results to skip before Gecko starts returning rows.

UnauthorizedError.description: The API key is missing, malformed, or invalid.

RateLimitedError.description: The API key reached the per-hour request limit.

InternalServerError.description: Gecko failed to process the request.

gitlabUrl.description: GitLab repository URL. You can include a branch in `?ref=` or in a `/-/tree/<branch>` path.
